# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

definition {  // Declare a definition block within your Jenkinsfile for Groovy DSL (Pipeline Syntax)  
    stages {    
        stage('Build'){//This is where we define our steps in the build phase of pipeline. In this case, step builds an image and pushes it to registry(s).  // Declare a definition block within your Jenkinsfile for Groovy DSL (Pipeline Syntax)   stages {
            agent any   
                tools 'docker'    
             steps{                echo "Building $BUILD_TAG image from source"                         script{         return value = dockerBuildAndPush(imageName: TRAVIS_TAG, registryUrl:"$REGISTRY/repo")   }        }}          //This is where we define our steps in the build phase of pipeline. In this case
